title: jasione maritima
intro: Jasione maritima, also known as sea lavender, is a perennial plant that belongs to the bellflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can aid in treating skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy in folk medicine. Sea lavender can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote a sense of calm and well-being.
